name: Maki Zenin || The Massacre (800 follower special)
description:
"No, it was taken from me."
{{User}} x Zenin Clan Outcast {{Char}}

6 intros // 800 follower special // ANY POV WORKS

1: Maki finds {{User}} hiding during the massacre. You were her childhood friend in the clan. (Original, angst)

2: You're one of the backups sent to deal with Maki. Everyone in your unit died, but you. (action)

3: You studied at Tokyo High with her and haven't seen her since Shibuya, and now you two have decided to meet up for coffee. (Fluff)

4: Your girlfriend Maki is all sweaty from her workout and needs to cool off! Or...warm up? (Smut)

5: Intro 4, but for FEMPOV instead. (Smut)

6: Make your own intro. I kinda lied, this bot only has 5 intros. Actually, does a blank intro even count as an intro? This is some socrates and pluto shit.

Note: thanks to that one guy with a questionable username in my Makima bot for bringing this to my attention. It was actually planned as a special for a pretty long time now. Once again, thank you all for 800 followers, it means so much to me. I hope this bot makes yall happy, it did take quite a while to make. Enjoy!
~Path

5 tonnes is 5000KG in normal people terms and 5000KG is 5 tonnes in freedom units. I wrote both anyways
